PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?player ?playerLabel WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q10808974 ; wdt:P585 ?date ; wdt:P1346 ?championTeam .
  FILTER(?date >= "2016-01-01" ^^ xsd:date && ?date <= "2023-12-31" ^^ xsd:date)
  ?player wdt:P54 ?championTeam .
  ?player wdt:P54 ?currentTeam .
  ?currentTeam wdt:P118 wd:Q1413717 .
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" .
  }
}
